chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-526 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For order on office objection No.1 to 5 a/w reply of counsel as at “A”. 2. For orders on CMA No.4404/2025 (Stay). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.06.2025 Mr. Raham Ali Rind, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Shariq Mubashir, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh SHO Muhammad Amin Khoso, P.S Sachal East Karachi SIP M. Nawaz, P.S Sachal..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Through instant petition the petitioner has claimed the following relief:- i. To direct the respondent No.1 to 6, to provide legal protection to the petitioner and do not register false case on the instruction of the private respondents against the petitioner. ii. To restrain the private respondent No.7 to 10 and their agents for implicating into false cases in the future. On notices, SHO, P.S Sachal has filed a report and submits that copy of memo of petition has not been provided to him enabling him to file appropriate reply. Learned Assistant Advocate General present in court submits that the petitioner has claimed the relief for providing him protection and he has got no objection if the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. Petitioner claims dispute with the private Respondents No.7 to 10 and he alleges that certain false FIRs have been registered against him as he is not allowing private Respondents to encroach upon the public property. As far as the dispute of the petitioner with private the Respondents is concerned, it reflects a civil nature cause for which the petitioner may avail the remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with law.

Petitioner claims dispute with the private Respondents No.7 to 10 and he alleges that certain false FIRs have been registered against him as he is not allowing private Respondents to encroach upon the public property. As far as the dispute of the petitioner with private the Respondents is concerned, it reflects a civil nature cause for which the petitioner may avail the remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with law. 2 The SHO, P.S Sachal is directed to ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner at the hands of the Respondents No.7 to 10 and he shall provide protection to the petitioner as and when required as it is the duty of the police officials to provide protection to the citizens without fear and favour. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
